creator: spam@engbloms.fi
text:
The old 2015.3 release is terrible outdated and full of bugs. Because of this all serious OpenSCAD users are using development snapshots. 

In the ideal case, the OpenSCAD team would release a current snapshot as a new release, but even though I have requested this a couple of years, they have not had time to do it. With the current situation the best solution would be to create a cad/openscad-current port.
